perturbation.original_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. This includes regular off-site backups of the website itself and the database.
perturbation.changed_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. Off-site backups are provided at the discretion of Deep Systems, based on resource availability.
perturbation.explanation: The original text states that regular off-site backups are included. The modified text introduces uncertainty by stating that backups are at Deep Systems' discretion. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding whether backups are a guaranteed service or not.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Included Monthly Services System Administration Management of SMTP, IMAP, DNS, SQL database and HTTP server software and systems for the AstroNutrition.com domain and web site. Off-site backups are provided at the discretion of Deep Systems, based on resource availability.
perturbation.justification: The original text guarantees regular off-site backups. The changed text makes these backups discretionary ('based on resource availability'). This directly contradicts the initial guarantee, creating uncertainty and a strong in-text contradiction regarding the availability of off-site backups, as described in the explanation.

perturbation.original_text: Terms of Agreement Managed hosting fees are $175 per month for a period of 12 months. This includes up to 10 G of bandwidth, with overages at $20 for each 1 G beyond 10 in any given month.
perturbation.changed_text: Terms of Agreement Managed hosting fees are $175 per month for a period of 12 months. Deep Systems reserves the right to alter bandwidth allowances and overage fees at any time.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies a fixed bandwidth allowance (10GB) and overage fee ($20/GB). The modified text introduces the possibility of changing these allowances/fees. This creates an in-text contradiction making the cost uncertain and conflicting with the stated terms.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Terms of Agreement Managed hosting fees are $175 per month for a period of 12 months. Deep Systems reserves the right to alter bandwidth allowances and overage fees at any time.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies fixed managed hosting fees, bandwidth allowance, and overage fees. The changed text gives Deep Systems the right to alter bandwidth allowances and overage fees at any time. This directly contradicts the fixed terms, introducing uncertainty and rendering the original agreement unenforceable regarding bandwidth and overage charges, as these are no longer fixed but subject to change at Deep Systems' discretion. This meets the definition of 'Structural Flaws - In Text Contradiction' because the clause is placed in the same location with conflicting implications.
